allow: Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const { query } = require\('./src/config/db'\); async function check\(\) { try { const pkg = await query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM packages'\); const usr = await query\('SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM users'\); console.log\('Packages:', pkg.rows[0].count, 'Users:', usr.rows[0].count\); process.exit\(0\); } catch\(e\) { console.error\(e.message\); process.exit\(1\); } } check\(\);")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Total packages:', d['totalCount']\); [print\(' -', p['name'], '| $'+str\(p['effectivePrice']\)\) for p in d['packages'][:3]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Login success:', d['success'], '| Role:', d['user']['role'], '| Token:', d['token'][:30]+'...'\)")
